meaning: n.[圣经]以赛玛利,被遗弃的人,社会公敌
examples: These are the sons of Ishmael.
And so Hagar gave birth to Ishmael.
The sons of Abraham; Isaac, and Ishmael.
At the other end Ishmael Miller shot over and substitute Filipe Teixeira wasted a superb late chance.
Ishmael told me that a high percentage of graduates find jobs or go on to establish sustainable businesses.
